title: melia azedarach
intro: Melia azedarach, also known as the chinaberry or bead tree, is a deciduous tree native to Asia and Australia, recognized for its distinctive purple berries and fragrant flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anthelmintic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Melia azedarach include reducing fever, relieving rheumatism and arthritis, and acting as an antiseptic to prevent infections. Herbal preparations of Melia azedarach include its berries, leaves, and bark, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal purposes.
